title: Converge the current stage and retire the preparation campaign

mainline.contradiction: Turn accumulated post-founding work into reviewable accepted or explicitly returned lines, then retire the temporary preparation formation without losing unique evidence.
acceptance: The current experiment receives content review, operational review, current verification, and a Principal PR disposition.
PR #16 and every staged legacy-experiment line receive an explicit return disposition.
F3 is evidenced and recorded, F4 receives a Principal decision, and F5 archives the campaign or names one remaining gate.

branches.purpose: Determine whether experiment/activation-field-scale at d66a125 is a coherent, verified stage fit for one integration PR.
branches.returnCondition: A content committee report, preparation operational report, current deterministic evidence, and Principal integrate/return/hold disposition are retained.
branches.mainlineDelta: PR #17 merged as 4df8307974146687328f1f961c9ff47d28102b83 after current-head verification and evidence-backed disposition of both AI review threads; the Work Cell, method, site, and operational stage is now present on main.

branches.purpose: Return PR #16 against the settled stage through rebase/integrate, no-change, or abandon without losing its Chinese README and Sequence-presentation work.
branches.returnCondition: The post-stage direct diff is reviewed and PR #16 has an explicit disposition and mainline delta.

branches.purpose: Partition the 129 staged side-worktree entries by durable evidence, later mission candidate, duplicate/superseded material, or abandonment.
branches.returnCondition: Every staged path is covered by a source/value/status partition and any retained implementation names a separate acceptance and review route.

branches.purpose: Record the F3 evidence, prepare the F4 remote-rule decision, and obtain the Principal F5 disposition that either archives preparation or names one missing gate.
branches.returnCondition: The campaign contains an evidence-backed F3 disposition, the actual F4 Principal choice and effect, and an F5 archive or explicit continuation reason.
